mentions.note: Exciting air-taxi thesis but severe cash burn and pre-commercial stage. Too speculative in tough market despite partnerships.
Electric air taxi (eVTOL), FAA phase 4, Dubai/Uber partnerships exciting, but losing too much money; no 'magical investing' era for unprofitable specs.
Caller Sherry question: Cramer not a flying-car guy; been right not to be. Prefers Boeing (BA) as better-positioned for advanced air-mobility tech if/when it materializes.
Way too risky, especially for new listener. Stock can drop real quick; better to stick with stable growth names.
Terrific spec; drone companies from opening segment may be even better specs on Pentagon tailwind.
